name: Being Interviewed || Karter
description:
Toon!User + AnyPOV

SFW intro, and I doubt there'd be smut unless you force it.

- You're famous, suspiciously so. Karter is gonna interview you to find out more about your success. -

And now, I present this blockhead clanker. He's my second ever Dandy's World OC, so he's special to me. He's a serious "Film Noir" inspired Journalist and Camera, and today he'll be having an interview with you. He's a Main character Toon in my little AU that I probably won't share. I didn't add any other toons, but I did mention Delilah and Arthur in the definition. You can probably mention a toon, their personality and appearance, then the AI will accept it.

Don't be a minor nor animal character, that's weird asf.

This isn't the first Camera OC on this site, but I'm not gonna gatekeep. Kadri by @GreedTeaMochi and Cameron by @Boogywoogywoo are PEAK.

Art by whyinotmyrlaccount on J.AI aheh.

LET ME KNOW IF I NEED TO CHANGE ANYTHING. I MAKE MORE MISTAKES THAN AI.

Huge update for 31 Jan, 2026; Made example dialogues, added a new intro, and reworked the original (original still available on 3rd swipe). Made the scenario more in-depth. Also added a valentines day intro! Kiss the Camera.

Tag: Dandy's World, Karter, Camera, Main, Main Toon, Toon, Toons, Main, Mains, Exhausted Worker, Journalist, Interview, Clanker
creator: whyinotmyrlaccount
